---
name: Task / enhancement
about: A scoped unit of work for RepoPact itself
title: "task: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Outcome

What should be true when this is done.

## Scope

Which owner scope this falls under (governance / work / evidence / tooling / docs)
and the files likely touched. Keep it to one scope where possible.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Observable, checkable outcome
- [ ] Validation and tests pass

## Notes

Links to relevant records (decisions, SPEC sections, existing work items).
